𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗚𝗔𝗜𝗧 | Developing and evaluating novel gait recognition models.  ✨ Notable!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Developing and evaluating novel gait recognition models.
📅 Created: Oct 2021 • Updated: May 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Flexible and extensible framework
✅ Supports designing and comparing custom gait recognition models
✅ Facilitates comparison with state-of-the-art methods
✅ Includes tutorials for datasets like GaitLU-1M and SUSTech1K
✅ Active development with recent publications and model releases (e.g., BiggerGait, LidarGait++, DenoisingGait)


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 228 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenGait is a Python-based framework designed for flexible and extensible gait recognition. It allows researchers to easily design and compare their own models against state-of-the-art methods, facilitating advancements in human identification through walking patterns.

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait

𝗖𝗙-𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗢 | Discovering the origin IP addresses of Cloudflare-protected web applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Discovering the origin IP addresses of Cloudflare-protected web applications.
📅 Created: Jul 2023 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multi-source intelligence gathering
✅ DNS reconnaissance (current and historical)
✅ Associated domain discovery
✅ Integration with search engines (ZoomEye, Censys, Shodan)
✅ Utilizes SecurityTrails historical records
✅ Active DNS enumeration
✅ Related domain correlation
✅ Response analysis for validation


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 227 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CF-Hero is a Go-based reconnaissance tool designed to uncover the origin IP addresses of web applications protected by Cloudflare. It leverages multiple intelligence sources and DNS reconnaissance techniques to identify and validate potential origin IPs, aiming to bypass Cloudflare's protection.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗟𝗢𝗖𝗔𝗟𝗦𝗘𝗡𝗗 | Securely and directly sharing files and messages between devices on the same local network without internet dependency.  🔥 Super Hot!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely and directly sharing files and messages between devices on the same local network without internet dependency.
📅 Created: Dec 2022 • Updated: May 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✅ Open-source and free
✅ Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS)
✅ Secure file and message sharing
✅ Local network transfer (no internet required)
✅ REST API and HTTPS encryption
✅ No third-party servers

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LocalSend is a free, open-source, cross-platform application designed for secure file and message sharing between nearby devices over a local network. It operates without requiring an internet connection or relying on third-party servers, utilizing a REST API and HTTPS encryption for secure communication.

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A desktop application for playing and managing music files with a focus on simplicity and a clean user interface.
📅 Created: Mar 2015 • Updated: May 2026

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Cross-platform music player (Linux, macOS, Windows)
✅ Supported audio formats: mp3, mp4, m4a/aac, flac, wav, ogg, 3gpp
✅ Library auto-refresh
✅ Playlists
✅ Queue management
✅ Shuffle, loop
✅ Cover art display
✅ Dark theme
✅ Playback speed control
✅ Sleep mode blocker
✅ .m3u import/export

🔍 57 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

Museeks is a simple, clean, and cross-platform music player built with Tauri and React. It offers essential music playback features like library management, playlists, queue control, and playback speed adjustments, aiming for a user-friendly experience across Linux, macOS, and Windows.

InnerTune is an Android application that provides a Material 3-themed client for YouTube Music. It allows users to stream music from YouTube Music without ads, offering features like background playback, offline downloads, synchronized lyrics, and Android Auto support.

Glide Browser is an extensible, keyboard-focused web browser built on Firefox. It aims to provide a highly efficient browsing experience for users who prefer keyboard navigation, offering features like modal keymaps, fuzzy tab management, and site-specific settings.
